pi_items.source: Matches DATASET_DEST in setup_task.sh and the task description.
Matches OUTPUT_FILE in setup_task.sh and the task description.
Verified against the verifier.py programmatic check and JASP source code for the internal analysis name.

Inspection of the source dataset (https://raw.githubusercontent.com/jasp-stats/jasp-desktop/master/Resources/Data%20Sets/Data%20Library/3.%20ANOVA/Viagra.csv) confirms the column name is lowercase 'dose'.

Inspection of the source dataset confirms it only contains integer levels 1, 2, and 3 for the 'dose' variable, with no string labels. Group 1 corresponds to Placebo, 2 to Low Dose, and 3 to High Dose.
Inspection of the JASP source code (MultinomialTest.qml) confirms the internal option name for Descriptives is 'descriptivesTable', not 'descriptives'.

privileged_info_summary: The target JASP project file is expected at /home/ga/Documents/JASP/MultinomialGOF.jasp. The input dataset is located at /home/ga/Documents/JASP/Viagra.csv. The actual variable name in the CSV dataset is lowercase 'dose', contradicting the capitalized name 'Dose' claimed in the metadata. The dataset contains only numerical groups (1, 2, 3), not the string labels ('Placebo', 'Low Dose', 'High Dose') listed in the task description and metadata, so the agent must manually map 1, 2, 3 to the expected proportions 0.5, 0.25, 0.25 respectively. The internal JASP option for Descriptives is 'descriptivesTable', contradicting 'descriptives'.
